arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Las Palmas in La Liga on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's five most expensive January transfers of all time
arts.sum: The Spaniard left Man City with 15 senior appearances under his belt and he was required to spend three seasons on loan at AC Milan before finally breaking into the Real Madrid team. Brahim Diaz spent five years at Manchester City, but he wasn’t convinced by his first-team pathway and opted to join Real Madrid for €17m in January 2019.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to submit new transfer offer next week

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Las Palmas
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Sunday’s match against Las Palmas in La Liga. As expected, Alaba made the list and will be available in this game, although Carlo Ancelotti said during his pre-match press conference that the defender will not feature in the starting lineup.

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois close to Belgium return after coach exit
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Thibaut Courtois is on course to return to the Belgium national team in 2025. The Los Blancos No.1 is currently eighth on the all-time list of appearances for the Red Devils with 102 caps. However, after his high-profile decision to step down from the squad in August 2024, the 32-year-old has not added to his […] The post Thibaut Courtois close to Belgium return after coach exit appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why Carlo Ancelotti could be facing Real Madrid sack
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is under increasing pressure to save his job as Real Madrid manager.
